Params.Name: Culture
Params.Description: The culture to set, as an IETF language tag (eg, "zh-Hans-CN").

Params.Name: SaveToConfig
Params.Description: If true, save the new setting to the users' "GameUserSettings" config so that it persists after a reload.

Return.Description: True if the culture was set, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: GetCurrentCulture
Functions.Description:
Get the current culture as an IETF language tag:
	   - A two-letter ISO 639-1 language code (eg, "zh").
	   - An optional four-letter ISO 15924 script code (eg, "Hans").
	   - An optional two-letter ISO 3166-1 country code (eg, "CN").

Return.Description: The culture as an IETF language tag (eg, "zh-Hans-CN").

Functions.Name: SetCurrentLanguage
Functions.Description: Set only the current language (for localization).

Params.Name: Culture
Params.Description: The language to set, as an IETF language tag (eg, "zh-Hans-CN").

Params.Name: SaveToConfig
Params.Description: If true, save the new setting to the users' "GameUserSettings" config so that it persists after a reload.

Return.Description: True if the language was set, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: GetCurrentLanguage
Functions.Description:
Get the current language (for localization) as an IETF language tag:
	   - A two-letter ISO 639-1 language code (eg, "zh").
	   - An optional four-letter ISO 15924 script code (eg, "Hans").
	   - An optional two-letter ISO 3166-1 country code (eg, "CN").

Return.Description: The language as an IETF language tag (eg, "zh-Hans-CN").

Functions.Name: SetCurrentLocale
Functions.Description: Set only the current locale (for internationalization).

Params.Name: Culture
Params.Description: The locale to set, as an IETF language tag (eg, "zh-Hans-CN").

Params.Name: SaveToConfig
Params.Description: If true, save the new setting to the users' "GameUserSettings" config so that it persists after a reload.

Return.Description: True if the locale was set, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: GetCurrentLocale
Functions.Description:
Get the current locale (for internationalization) as an IETF language tag:
	   - A two-letter ISO 639-1 language code (eg, "zh").
	   - An optional four-letter ISO 15924 script code (eg, "Hans").
	   - An optional two-letter ISO 3166-1 country code (eg, "CN").

Return.Description: The locale as an IETF language tag (eg, "zh-Hans-CN").

Functions.Name: SetCurrentLanguageAndLocale
Functions.Description: Set the current language (for localization) and locale (for internationalization).

Params.Name: Culture
Params.Description: The language and locale to set, as an IETF language tag (eg, "zh-Hans-CN").

Params.Name: SaveToConfig
Params.Description: If true, save the new setting to the users' "GameUserSettings" config so that it persists after a reload.

Return.Description: True if the language and locale were set, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: SetCurrentAssetGroupCulture
Functions.Description: Set the given asset group category culture from an IETF language tag (eg, "zh-Hans-CN").

Params.Name: AssetGroup
Params.Description: The asset group to set the culture for.

Params.Name: Culture
Params.Description: The culture to set, as an IETF language tag (eg, "zh-Hans-CN").

Params.Name: SaveToConfig
Params.Description: If true, save the new setting to the users' "GameUserSettings" config so that it persists after a reload.

Return.Description: True if the culture was set, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: GetCurrentAssetGroupCulture
Functions.Description: Get the given asset group category culture.

Params.Name: AssetGroup
Params.Description: The asset group to get the culture for.

Return.Description: The culture as an IETF language tag (eg, "zh-Hans-CN").

Functions.Name: ClearCurrentAssetGroupCulture
Functions.Description: Clear the given asset group category culture.

Params.Name: AssetGroup
Params.Description: The asset group to clear the culture for.

Params.Name: SaveToConfig
Params.Description: If true, save the new setting to the users' "GameUserSettings" config so that it persists after a reload.
